prompts.content: What's one thing you've been avoiding? Name it, then write down the smallest possible first step.
Rate your energy right now 1–10. What would move it one point higher?
What would you tell your past self from one year ago?
Name three things that went well this week, however small.
What belief is quietly holding you back right now?
Who do you want to become? Describe that person in the present tense.
What's something you've been meaning to let go of?
Describe a moment this week when you felt most like yourself.
What are you tolerating that you don't have to?
Write for 5 minutes about {theme} without stopping or editing.
Sketch the view from where you're sitting using only 10 lines.
Write a six-word story about your current situation.
Take one photo that represents how you feel right now. No filter.
What creative project have you been dreaming about? Write one concrete thing you could do today.
Describe your current mood as a landscape.
Pick an object near you. Write its autobiography in 5 sentences.
What would you make if you knew no one would judge it?
Create something — anything — using only {constraint}.

constraint: the colors you can see right now
five minutes and whatever's in front of you

prompts.content: Combine {thing1} and {thing2} into something new. Sketch or describe it.
What's the single most important thing you could work on today? Do that first.
Write down everything in your head about your current project — clear the mental cache.
Who could you ask for help today? What would you ask them?
What would make this project 10× better? What would make it good enough to ship?
What's one assumption about this project you haven't tested yet?
List every open loop in your current work. Pick one to close today.
If you had to explain your project to someone in 2 sentences, what would you say?
What's the part of this project you're most uncertain about? Write down why.
What would 'done' actually look like? Describe it concretely.
Spend the next 25 minutes focused only on {area}. Close everything else.

area: one decision you need to make

prompts.content: Review your {aspect} and identify one thing to improve or eliminate.

prompts.caption: Where are you headed? Is that still where you want to go?
